message:
feat(suggest): Implement ms suggest CLI with contextual bandit recommendations

Add comprehensive skill suggestion command with:
- Context-aware recommendations using ContextualBandit with Thompson sampling
- Explanation mode (--explain) showing score breakdowns
- Discovery mode (--discover) for exploring under-used skills
- Personal mode (--personal) boosting historical preferences
- Domain filtering (--domain)
- Auto-load support (--load with --top)
- Cooldown management to avoid repetitive suggestions
- Suggestion tracking for learning

The command:
1. Captures working context (project type, tools, recent files)
2. Extracts features for contextual bandit
3. Gets bandit recommendations with Thompson sampling
4. Applies optional filters (domain, cooldowns, personal boost)
5. Tracks shown suggestions for learning
6. Outputs human-friendly or JSON (--robot) format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
